name: Chronic Kidney Disease
tagline: Our most comprehensive section, built from years of real experience.
description: From diagnosis through IRIS staging, diet, fluids, phosphorus management, and quality of life. Built from years managing Bruce's CKD and now Milton and Sorbet's early-stage disease.

name: Diabetes
description: Managing blood sugar, insulin dosing, diet, and the day-to-day reality of a diabetic cat.

name: Hyperthyroidism
tagline: Common in senior cats. Often overlapping with CKD.
description: Overactive thyroid is one of the most common senior cat conditions — and its interaction with kidney disease is frequently misunderstood.

name: Cancer
description: From diagnosis to treatment decisions to the hardest conversations. Covers mammary cancer, lymphoma, cytology, chemotherapy, and quality-of-life decision frameworks.

name: Asthma & Respiratory
tagline: Managing chronic respiratory conditions alongside other diagnoses.
description: Feline asthma, inhalers, triggers, and how respiratory disease interacts with other chronic conditions.

name: FIV & FeLV
tagline: Better prognosis than most people think.
description: Retroviral infections — what a positive diagnosis actually means for your cat's life expectancy, and how to manage it alongside other conditions.

name: Neurological & Mystery Illness
tagline: For the undiagnosed cat. For Artie.
description: Overlapping conditions, unexplained decline, and how to keep advocating when the tests come back negative. This section exists because of Artie.

name: Multi-Condition & Complex Cases
tagline: When nobody has the full picture.
description: When your cat has two, three, or four overlapping diagnoses and the specialists aren't talking to each other.
